golden_categories.name: General Credit Card Validation

generated_categories.name: Input Type and Format Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests that ensure the input is a valid string and properly formatted for credit card validation.

generated_categories.name: Provider-Specific Validation

generated_categories.description: Tests that validate credit card numbers without specifying a provider or using default behavior.

generated_categories.name: Luhn Algorithm Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests that ensure the credit card number passes the Luhn algorithm check.

golden_to_generated.reason: GENC-3 covers general validation without specifying a provider, and GENC-4 focuses on Luhn algorithm validation, which is a subset of general credit card validation.
GENC-2 explicitly addresses provider-specific validation, including handling invalid providers, which aligns directly with GC-2.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with AmEx validation but does not focus exclusively on AmEx.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with Diners Club validation but does not focus exclusively on Diners Club.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with Discover validation but does not focus exclusively on Discover.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with JCB validation but does not focus exclusively on JCB.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with Mastercard validation but does not focus exclusively on Mastercard.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with UnionPay validation but does not focus exclusively on UnionPay.
GENC-2 includes provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with Visa validation but does not focus exclusively on Visa.

generated_to_golden.reason: GENC-1 focuses on input type and format validation, which is a subset of general credit card validation.
GENC-2 addresses provider-specific validation, which partially overlaps with multiple golden categories focused on specific providers.
GENC-3 covers general validation without specifying a provider, which aligns partially with GC-1.
GENC-4 focuses on Luhn algorithm validation, which is a subset of general credit card validation.
